scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/shared && npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w client
scripts.balance: npm run build -w packages/shared && node scripts/balance-audit.mjs
